title: Seamless OAuth Login
content: Section 3.2: Seamless OAuth login to increase user conversion. Users must complete authentication in under 3 seconds on first launch. Support Google and Microsoft SSO across iOS, Android, and Web. Zero visible error screens during the happy path. Conversion target: 78% signup completion (up from 62%).
acceptance_criteria: OAuth flow completes without user seeing more than one redirect
Session persists for 30 days without re-login
